'''''Return of the Jedi Annual'' 1984''' was a hardcover comic book released in the United Kingdom that reprinted the stories from [[Star Wars (1977) 77|''Star Wars'' 77]], [[Star Wars (1977) 79|''Star Wars'' 79]], and [[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' 80]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 77|''Star Wars'' (1977) 77]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 79|''Star Wars'' (1977) 79]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' (1977) 80]]
